page: Microsoft Azure E64s_v7 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the Esv7 family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, requiring the use of external Premium Storage options for persistent data. It contains zero GPUs, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphical or machine learning workloads. Additionally, the instance does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

With its high memory-to-vCPU ratio, the E64s_v7 offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications such as large relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning systems, and large-scale data analytics where data must reside in system memory to avoid disk latency.
description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server from the Esv7 family, featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 512.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on external Premium Storage for data persistence. This hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, including large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and data analytics pipelines that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical disks or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64s_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512.0 GB RAM, and Premium Storage support.
tagline: An x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
Premium Storage capable with zero local storage
Designed for large databases and in-memory applications
